PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; $r = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5010" -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "OK" } catch { $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output $r; $r2 = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5009" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "API OK" } catch { "API: " + $_.Exception.Message }; Write-Output $r2)

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; $webReady = $false; $apiReady = $false; while \(\(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalSeconds -lt 60\) { if \(-not $webReady\) { try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5076" -TimeoutSec 2 -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop | Out-Null; $webReady = $true; Write-Output "Web ready!" } catch {} }; if \(-not $apiReady\) { try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5009/api/auth/login" -Method POST -TimeoutSec 2 -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop | Out-Null; $apiReady = $true } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $apiReady = $true; Write-Output "API ready!" } } }; if \($webReady -and $apiReady\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; if \(-not $webReady\) { Write-Output "Web NOT ready" }; if \(-not $apiReady\) { Write-Output "API NOT ready" })

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; while \(\(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalSeconds -lt 45\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5009/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{}' -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop; Write-Output "API OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; break } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response -ne $null\) { Write-Output "API responding: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; break } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; Write-Output "Done")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{}' -ContentType 'application/json' -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop; "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "Responding on 8080: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" } else { "Not on 8080 either: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5076" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop | Out-Null; "Web OK" } catch { "Web error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($start = Get-Date; while \(\(\(Get-Date\) - $start\).TotalSeconds -lt 60\) { try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5076" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop | Out-Null; Write-Output "Web ready on 5076"; break } catch {}; try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5010" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing -EA Stop | Out-Null; Write-Output "Web ready on 5010"; break } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4 }; Write-Output "Poll finished")

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { $r = netstat -ano | findstr ":5009"; if \($r\) { Write-Output $r; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; if \(-not $r\) { Write-Output "timeout" })

PowerShell($p = netstat -ano | Select-String ":8080 " | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Killed PID $p" } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 8080" })
